display.purpose: Page-level headings; fixed rem, never fluid.

title.purpose: Section and card titles (rendered as real h2 headings).

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked column headers and metadata captions only.

numeric.purpose: Geist Mono tabular figures for ALL prices, %, volumes, caps, ranks. Bound to the .tabular-nums hook.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Default for in-flow containers. Depth comes from hairline rings and tonal layering, never drop shadows.

shadows.name: ring-hairline
shadows.purpose: The 1px ring that draws cards, the table, the stats strip, and active tabs as crisp planes.

shadows.name: overlay-soft
shadows.purpose: The ONE permitted drop shadow: floating overlays (dropdowns, popovers, tooltips, dialogs, toasts) that float over arbitrary content. In-flow containers never use it.

shadows.name: focus-signal
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus only. Glow means focused, nothing else.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes; users are in flow.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: All entrance/zoom/slide animations and long transitions collapse to near-instant.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-emphasis action on a view. Signal Lime fill, near-black text. On touch (coarse pointer) icon variants grow to 44px.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.84 0.19 120); color: oklch(0.18 0.02 140); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.80 0.18 120); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.84 0.19 120 / 0.50); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Default toolbar action (sort, currency, search trigger). Hairline border, fills to Surface High on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.31 0.008 140); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.17 0.008 140); color: oklch(0.96 0.006 140); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.25 0.010 140); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.84 0.19 120 / 0.50); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Filter field with leading search glyph. Border + ring shift to Signal on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: 16rem; } .ds-field-icon { position: absolute; left: 0.625rem; width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); pointer-events: none; } .ds-input-search { height: 2rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem 0.25rem 2rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.31 0.008 140); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.17 0.008 140); color: oklch(0.96 0.006 140); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); } .ds-input-search:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.84 0.19 120); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.84 0.19 120 / 0.50); }

components.name: Count Badge
components.description: Pill marker for counts and live indicators. Signal fill; green/red are never used as a chip brand color.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.84 0.19 120); color: oklch(0.18 0.02 140); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Self-contained widget surface. Flat, hairline ring, tonal Surface bg. Uppercase Label caption, numeric value in Geist Mono.
components.html:
Total Market Cap
$2.41T
+1.8% ▲
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: oklch(0.21 0.009 140); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.96 0.006 140 / 0.10); } .ds-card-label { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(0.96 0.006 140); } .ds-card-delta { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(0.76 0.16 152); }

components.name: Watchlist Star
components.description: Favorite toggle. Gold when active (Favorite Gold status color, tokenized). Hit area grows to 44px on touch via @media (pointer: coarse).
components.html: <button class="ds-star is-on" aria-label="Remove from watchlist" aria-pressed="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="12 2 15.1 8.6 22 9.3 17 14.1 18.2 21 12 17.8 5.8 21 7 14.1 2 9.3 8.9 8.6 12 2" fill="currentColor"></polygon></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-star { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.25rem; border: none; background: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-star svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .ds-star:hover, .ds-star.is-on { color: oklch(0.84 0.16 82); } @media (pointer: coarse) { .ds-star { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0; } }

components.name: Market Table Row
components.description: Signature component. Rank + coin + price + gain/loss %, all Geist Mono tabular, right-aligned. Direction pairs color WITH a sign. Hover lifts to Surface High.
components.html: 3SolanaSOL$172.40+4.21% ▲−1.06% ▼
components.css: .ds-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2rem 1fr auto 5.5rem 5.5rem; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.17 0.008 140); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.31 0.008 140); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-row:hover { background: oklch(0.25 0.010 140); } .ds-row-rank { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); text-align: right; } .ds-row-coin { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-row-name { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.96 0.006 140); } .ds-row-sym { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.70 0.010 140); } .ds-row-price { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.96 0.006 140); text-align: right; } .ds-row-up { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.76 0.16 152); text-align: right; } .ds-row-down { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.66 0.21 25); text-align: right; }

narrative.overview: HODL is a precision instrument, not a website. The whole system is built around a single job: a trader glances at the screen and, in under a second, reads the state of the market. Surfaces are flat graphite glass; dividers are hairlines; the numbers themselves — in a tabular monospace — are the brightest, most deliberate material on the screen. Color is rationed and semantic: green means up, red means down, and one acid-lime Signal marks the thing you can act on. It rejects the stock-shadcn neutral starter it grew out of, the meme-coin casino, and the navy-and-gold fintech template. Dark-native and composed: an after-hours trading desk, graphite and quiet, with figures ticking in cool light.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native graphite surface; light theme is a clean daylight equivalent, never an afterthought.
Monospace tabular numerics treated as the hero material — figures align to the decimal, everywhere.
One rationed brand color (Signal lime) for interaction only; green/red reserved for market direction.
Flat by default: hairline rings and tonal layering convey depth, never drop shadows (overlays excepted).
Sub-second glanceability is the acceptance test for every layout decision.

rules.name: The Three-Channel Rule
rules.body: Color carries exactly three meanings and they never trade jobs: Signal Lime = actionable, Green = market up, Red = market down. Signal never colors a number; green/red never color a button. Favorite gold and the Fear & Greed gradient are tokenized status colors, kept off the three channels.

rules.name: The Rationed Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Lime appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its scarcity is what makes the live, actionable element findable in a dense grid of figures.

rules.name: The Color-Plus-Sign Rule
rules.body: Market direction is never conveyed by hue alone. Every gain/loss value pairs its color with a sign and/or arrow so the signal survives color blindness and grayscale.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Monospace Rule
rules.body: If it's a figure a trader compares — price, %, volume, cap, rank — it is Geist Mono with tabular figures, right-aligned in tables, decimal-aligned in columns. Bound once to the .tabular-nums hook.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are a fixed rem scale (ratio approx 1.2), never clamp(). A heading that shrinks inside a sidebar or card looks broken, not responsive.

rules.name: The Ring-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: In-flow containers — cards, the table, panels, the stats strip — are separated by hairline rings and tonal steps, never by box-shadow. The one exception is true floating overlays (dropdowns, popovers, tooltips, dialogs, toasts), which pair the ring with a single soft shadow for separation. Everything anchored in the page layout stays flat.

rules.name: The Glow-Is-Focus Rule
rules.body: Among in-flow elements the only shadow-like effect permitted is the focus ring — a 3px Signal-tinted ring on keyboard focus. Glow means focused, nothing else.

dos: Do set every figure (price, %, volume, market cap, rank) in Geist Mono with tabular-nums, right-aligned in tables and decimal-aligned in columns.
Do reserve color to three meanings — Signal Lime = actionable, Green = up, Red = down — and keep Signal Lime to ≤10% of any screen.
Do pair every gain/loss with a sign or arrow (+2.4% ▲ / -1.1% ▼), so direction survives color blindness and grayscale.
Do convey depth with hairline rings and tonal layering (Background -> Surface -> Surface High); reserve drop shadows for floating overlays only.
Do use skeleton loaders for data, teaching empty states, tokenized status colors, and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do keep type on a fixed rem scale (approx 1.2 ratio); reserve uppercase tracked Labels for column headers and metadata captions; render card/section titles as real headings.
donts: Don't ship the stock-shadcn chroma-zero neutral palette — the un-branded gray that reads as 'AI made that' is the #1 anti-reference.
Don't drift toward the meme-coin casino (neon gradients, decorative glow, FOMO energy) or the navy-and-gold fintech template.
Don't color a number with Signal Lime or color a button with Green/Red. The three channels never trade jobs.
Don't use box-shadow to separate in-flow containers, or border-left/border-right >1px as a colored stripe accent.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, or display fonts in labels/buttons/data.
Don't use clamp() fluid headings in the app UI, or proportional (non-tabular) digits in a data column.
Don't wrap the primary data table in a card, and never nest a card inside a card.
Don't hard-code colors outside the token system; the only exception is white labels on always-saturated data-viz tiles (the heatmap).
